language.name: Dza
language.location: Jen town, Karim-Lamido LGA, Taraba State, Nigeria

cardinal.dza: nwutsɨng ji bwali yantsɨ hywa bwatə

genitive.alienable: marker və̀: ìdzwa və̀ Nlabe = Nlabe's dog

tense_aspect.non_past: n (after subject pronoun): sɨn wulɨ = is coming
tense_aspect.perfective: yang (completed action): chi yang = found already
tense_aspect.habitual: sɨn + verb: sɨn tswekə = does/is doing
tense_aspect.progressive: sɨn + verb + lɨ: sɨn wulɨ = is coming
tense_aspect.imperative_pl: ba + verb: ba wu = come (you all)!

grammar.negation: verb + lo: yi wə lo = did not know him
grammar.relative_clause: nɨ marks relative: ifɨ nɨ wu = person who came
grammar.copula: dɨ...kə: Dɨ mə kə Ivə = You are the King
grammar.conditional: aba...yang: Aba a yipɨ yang = If you knew
grammar.purpose: hɛbələ = so that, bisɨ = because/in order to
grammar.question_formation: add wəde (who), bede (what), bě (where), tswe wũ/nwu (why)
grammar.reported_speech: tsa + quote: o tsa 'dɨ mi kə...' = he said 'I am...'

abstract_nouns.english: when the lot fell/turn of duty

function_words.dza: vi kitə a kə a itsɨng

religious_spiritual.dza: yi be ifɨ tũ / yilɨ tũ

religious_spiritual.english: Son of the Most High God

key_phrases.dza: Kə akang sɨ min nə mə lə
Fi tswebi və Fangwa kə achɛ̃
Ba mə nɨhyã və Itwebɨ chĩhywa
key_phrases.english: Make straight the way of the Lord

key_phrases.dza: Dɨ mi kə kumpa tə hũlɨ
key_phrases.english: I am the bread of life

key_phrases.dza: Dɨ mi kə pɨ akəlɨ Fangwa
key_phrases.english: I am the light of the world

key_phrases.dza: Mi dɨ igbə nɨngtsa a pikang
Mi be Ta bɨ dɨ e ifɨ a tsɨng
key_phrases.english: I and the Father are one

key_phrases.dza: Pəko chilɨ və Ibrahim, Mi n lə!
A tsɨpu a kwa ki mə a ho a tə
key_phrases.english: Get up, pick up your mat, and walk

key_phrases.dza: Ke ifɨ nɨ lɨng le wə hɛ̃ o wu sɨ mi o nwa
key_phrases.english: Whoever is thirsty, come to me and drink

key_phrases.dza: Bi anɨng yin wa bə lɨle
key_phrases.english: The truth will set you free

key_phrases.dza: N wu bisɨ e chi hũlɨ, e hũ kə a itsɨng
key_phrases.english: I came that they may have life, life abundantly

key_phrases.dza: Bi ban bibi yɛ dɨ mi
key_phrases.english: Don't be afraid, it is I

key_phrases.dza: Dɨ mi kə ifɨ nɨ n tsa Mi Dɨ wə nɨ
key_phrases.english: I am who I say I am

key_phrases.dza: Dɨ mi be tsɨkunɨng yi be ifɨ tũ, be təlɨ a hũlɨ
key_phrases.english: I am the resurrection and the life

key_phrases.dza: Dɨ lenwa a hu sɨ min tə bə
key_phrases.english: A new commandment I give you

key_phrases.dza: Yənwa tsikə a və Fi kəachɛ̃
Ifɨ nɨ sɨ man tswebi o kə achɛ̃ nɨ lwe nɨngshi
key_phrases.english: The one you love is sick

key_phrases.dza: Itwemi, e tsa sako a lə yang ke hywĩ mi bwi lo
key_phrases.english: Lord, if you had been here my brother would not have died

key_phrases.dza: A donɨ hɛ̃, n kwələ a lo pu miw
key_phrases.english: Never! You shall never wash my feet

key_phrases.dza: Ke ifɨ nɨ kang hũlɨ wə hɛ̃ hũlɨ wə yin lɨla
key_phrases.english: Whoever holds onto their life will lose it

key_phrases.dza: Jɛnɨ pa yɛ tatalɨ, man yənwa hywi bwatə a tsa a yi mi lo
key_phrases.english: Before the rooster crows, you will deny me three times

key_phrases.dza: Min tə hũlɨ mi bisɨ mə
key_phrases.english: I will lay down my life for you
The Lord God is with you

key_phrases.dza: Nɨng a shilɨ ywang sɨ Fi

key_phrases.english: I am the servant of the Lord

key_phrases.dza: Hũlɨ mi sɨn tə Itwebɨ Fi kãlɨ
Kwang mi sɨn bɛ Fi nɨ wa mi le kə nɨ
key_phrases.english: My spirit rejoices in God my Savior

key_phrases.dza: Dɨbə imwə nɨ yin myɛ kə?
Man dɨ ywa, man chi kə yɨ a ibwi
key_phrases.english: You will conceive and bear a son

key_phrases.dza: Mə dɨ ifɨ parkə bɨngsə e sə iye hɛ̃
Bɨ yənwa sɨ Itwebɨ, Fi və Israila
key_phrases.english: Praise be to the Lord, God of Israel

key_phrases.dza: A chi kutswəmə yang sɨ Fi
key_phrases.english: You have found favor with God

key_phrases.dza: Dɨ mi Jibrailu nɨ sɨn tsɨkə pɨpi Fi nɨ
key_phrases.english: I am Gabriel who stands in the presence of God

sò n hò gúdú gúdú
nɨ́ŋmárí dè tə̃́ yɨ̀lɨ́ yɨ̀lɨ́
ò jí bē nyívī fɛ̌̀fɛ̌̄
jɨ́ mī
ò wù dò
mə̀-n tə́-tə́
mə̀-n tə́-tə̂
Sɨ pəsɔ Bi lə
example_sentences.english: In the beginning was the Word

example_sentences.dza: Fi tswebi və Fangwa kə achɛ̃
A tə mi mɨng lə n nwa
Ba wu ba bə
Dɨ mi kə Iwalena de lo
Bɨ chi Iwalena de yang
Mɨng a nwalɨ və le tɨng yang
Ke nɨng nɨ o nə bə lə hɛ̃ ba tswe
example_sentences.english: Whatever he tells you, do it

example_sentences.dza: Tɔle e mə ifɨ e chi lo yang
Ifɨ nɨ nwa mɨng nɨ min təkə nɨ lɨng lo
example_sentences.english: Whoever drinks the water I give will never thirst

example_sentences.dza: O bwɛ hywa o nu nɨng mi
example_sentences.english: He made mud and put it on my eyes

example_sentences.dza: Tə n lo nɨng mi bwa nvɔ Siluwam

example_sentences.dza: N tə hũlɨ mi yang bisɨ e nɨngpungga de

Lazaru, yi a ji
Yeso ta gə̃mi

Hywĩ mə yin yiyi
O se nywi de kəpu Yeso fə o mwə tsaku wə son nukə
example_sentences.english: She poured perfume on Jesus' feet and wiped them with her hair

example_sentences.dza: Ba pĩ nɨng tswi bwa, ba le wə na o tə
example_sentences.english: Take off the grave clothes and let him go

example_sentences.dza: Ifɨ tsɨng bwi bisɨ e ifɨ
example_sentences.english: One man should die for the people

example_sentences.dza: Səko mə iye! Itwebɨ Fi tsung be mə

example_sentences.dza: Mi dɨ shə və Fi
